meaning: n.包装工人,打包机,包装食品生产厂(或厂主)
examples: Norma Jones worked as a packer in a local chemical factory.
the name and address of the packer or distributor;
I became an expert packer but always struggled with skincare.
So off strode Mr Packer to redesign cricket as he thought it should be.
He hired a "co-packer" in the Midwest that would fill the pouches with applesauce.
